description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a dense ring of mature trees, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The house features a gable roof with gray shingles and a prominent central chimney. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely painted wood or stucco, and there is a small porch at the front entrance. Multiple windows are visible, arranged symmetrically on the front facade, allowing natural light to enter the living spaces. A curved stone pathway leads to the front porch, enhancing the welcoming appearance. The landscaping includes flowering shrubs and well-maintained greenery, contributing to the cozy, suburban feel.
description: A cozy, single-story bungalow with a gable roof, central chimney, and a small front porch, surrounded by a dense ring of mature trees and lush landscaping.
description_view_0: The bungalow is partially obscured by trees, with the roof and central chimney visible above the foliage.
description_view_1: The front of the bungalow is visible, showing the porch, main entrance, and a curved stone pathway leading up to it.
description_view_2: The side of the bungalow is seen, with the chimney and more of the roof exposed, and trees closely encircling the house.
description_view_3: The rear and side of the bungalow are visible, with the gable roof and surrounding trees forming a dense perimeter.
